# devflow

> devflow creates isolated development branch environments for every Git branch, including stateful services (databases, caches, queues), with automation-friendly CLI behavior.

Use these defaults for agent runs:

- Prefer `--json --non-interactive` for machine-safe execution.
- Use `devflow --json capabilities` to detect automation guarantees.
- Use `--no-verify` on `switch` in headless environments to avoid interactive hook approvals.

## Start Here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Agent-first onboarding, bootstrap flow, and automation contract.
- [README.md](README.md): Product overview, quickstart, and command examples.
- [docs/index.html](docs/index.html): Full command and configuration reference.

## Agent Workflows

- [examples/agent-bootstrap.sh](examples/agent-bootstrap.sh): Idempotent setup for agents/CI.
- [examples/agent-task.sh](examples/agent-task.sh): Create/switch task environment and fetch connection info.
- [examples/simple.devflow.yml](examples/simple.devflow.yml): Minimal single-service setup.
- [examples/multi-service.devflow.yml](examples/multi-service.devflow.yml): Multi-service setup with hooks/worktrees.

## Core Implementation

- [src/cli.rs](src/cli.rs): Command routing, JSON/non-interactive behavior, orchestration.
- [src/config/mod.rs](src/config/mod.rs): Config loading, merging, and branch filter logic.
- [src/services/factory.rs](src/services/factory.rs): Multi-backend orchestration semantics.
- [src/hooks/executor.rs](src/hooks/executor.rs): Hook execution, approvals, and non-interactive behavior.
- [src/vcs/git.rs](src/vcs/git.rs): Git provider and hook integration details.

## Optional

- [DEVFLOW_PLAN.md](DEVFLOW_PLAN.md): Historical design notes and roadmap ideas.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Additional project guidance and examples.
